title: Sasho gem
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:RareSashoGem.png|130px|thumb|A rare Sasho gem]]
'''Sasho gems''' were gemstones native to the planet [[Baralou]]. A one-kilogram stone was worth approximately 5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Often, they could be found in trade with the native [[Multopos]] for as little as a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and a few [[Power cell/Legends|power packs]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Grand Prize|book=The Far Orbit Project}} {{1st}}
*{{GalaxiesNGE}}
